intro.tutorialStep5Body: Mana biltoo bilisaa uumi ammoo amaloota dabalataa banuuf
intro.tutorialStep3Body: Tracker Player muuziqaa sochoosaa ta’een fakkiiwwan yeroo dhugaa lama walii galfamanii jiraachisa:
intro.tutorialClosing: Dhaggeeffachuu keessanitti gammadaa — muuziqaa irratti gammadaa!
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Tracker Player ba salphaatti fooyyessuu danda'ama. Ikoonii gear (top bar) ykn Settings ear (left sidebar) fayyadamuun sajoo galchaa:
intro.introWelcome: Balbala keessan kan muuziqaa hordoftaa 68+ foormaatii keessatti gammachiisuuf — MOD fi XM beekamoo irraa kaasee hanga MPTM fi UMX ammayyaaatti — walitti qabaa guddaa irraa fudhachuun
intro.tutorialLead: Karaan kun siin qajeelcha amaloota hunda Tracker Player keessaa, akkaataa rikoodii kee jalqabaa argachuu irraa kaasee hanga taphatticha hojiitti fooyyessutti.
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Sammiwwan sagalee tarreeffama keessaa kamiyyuu cuqaasiitii taphachuu jalqabi. Taphataa sagalee yeroodhuma sana fe'ama — filiiwwan hedduu sekondii tokkoo gaditti taphachuu jalqabu. Yeroo sagaleen tokko taphachaa jiru, kan argan:
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Pilaayistiiin gamaa fi qaama Tracker Player ti. Baaraa barbaaduu kan fiixee jiru fayyadamuun faayilaawwan ykn mata dureewwan adda baafachuu dandeessa. Baaraa barbaaduu jala, baala ittiin calleessan cimaa tokko argita:
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Hubba gorsa: Mobayil irratti, Tracker Player galmee mana keessanitti dabaluun muuxannoo appii dhalataa fakkaatu argachuu dandeessu. Piroogireesiiwiib Appii oflaayinii keessatti kaashii godhatee baay'ee gaarii hojjeta.
intro.introWelcomeNote: Tracker Player kan qofa taphataa miti — inni sadarkaa muuziqaa hordoftuu guutuu kan qabu, fuula miidhagaa fi deebii kennuu, agarsiisa paaternii yeroo dhugaa, osiloskooppii kanalaa hundaaf, fi meeshaalee muuziqaa hordoftuu argachuu fi itti gammachuu meeshaa kamiinuu salphisuuf qophaa'eedha.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Hanga guyyaa kanaatti, muuziqaa tracker keessaa demoscene addunyaa fi jaalattoonni kompitara durii gidduutti jiraachuu itti fufa. Tracker Player, karaa fuula ammayyaa fi walnyaatinsa mijataa ta'een, namoota baay'ee gara artii addaa kana kan seenaa muuziqaa kompitaraa baatuutti beeksisuu ni abdata.
intro.changelogIntro: Tracker Player'n jalqabarraa akka MOD/XM taphattuu salphaa ta'ee jiraachuu isaa irraa guddachaa, jijjiirama guddaa fideera. Asitti yeroo gurguddoo tarreeffama isaa:
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , browser-rraa Amiga MOD/XM tracker ta'ee, Steffest jedhamuun JavaScript qulqulluudhaan barreeffame, muuxannoo cimdii tracker durii akka ta'etti deebisee uumu. Bu'uura kana irratti ijaaree, pirojektichi Chiptune3 (mootora WebAssembly kan libopenmpt irratti hundaa'e) fi FFmpeg server-side transcoding walitti dabalee, gosa foormaatii MOD/XM jalqabaa irraa gara foormaatii 68 olitti bal'ise.
intro.introWhatBody3: Qooxoo sagalee fi calalii, fakkii sagalee, sirna herrega fayyadamtootaa fi deeggarsa addunyaa irratti, Tracker Player naannoo amaloota cinaa guutuu kan qopheesse qaama xiyyeeffannaa taphattii irratti, kaayyoon isaa akka fayyadamtoonni beekumsa teekinikaa malee hawwaa addaa muuziiqaa trackeritti gammachuu argachuu danda'aniif.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Vue.js meta-framework kan nuqnaa frontend fi backend keenya guutuu humneessu. Nuxt server-side rendering karaa fuula ariifachiisaa fi SEO, server Nitro karaa API routes, SQLite database walitti hidhamuu, fi code-splitting ofumaan hojjatu karaa hojii gaarii ta'eef kenna.
intro.introWhatBody1: Tracker Player pirojeektii baneeffamaa fi madda banaa kan dhaabbataa ta'ee fi kan ofii isaati, kan aartii muuziqaa trackerii gara browserii ammayyaa fiduuf kan of kenne. Inni injinii sagalee haaraya miti, garuu walitti hidhannaa gad fageenyaa fi guddina lammaffaa kan irratti hojjetame kan pirojeektii madda banaa gaarii jiran irratti hundaa'e, kan sirna muuxannoo fayyadamaa guutuu uumu.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Framworkii JavaScript kanarra kan nu component-based UI keessatti fayyadamnu. Vue's Composition API, sirna reactivity, fi componentota faayilii tokkoo, daawwataa fi koodii qulqulluu, modulaarii fayyadamuun, fuula fayyadamaa walxaxaa ijaaruu fi kunuunsuu nuuf dandeessise.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player kan ijaarsa meesumaa banaa irratti ijaarame. Kuusaa muuziqaa keenyaa kan 135,400+ ta’u hunduu The Mod Archive irraa fudhatame — kan innis kuusaa muuziqaa trackerii internettii irratti amanamaa ta’e. Hojii isaanii kana danda’eesse hundaaf galata guddaa qabna.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Daawwannoonni hundinuu Tracker Player keessatti URL dhaabbataa, qoodamuu danda'u qaba. Yeroo daawwannoonni taphachaa jiru, kopii liinkii irraa barreeffama teessoo braawzarii kee irraa fuudhi — inni akka /sirba/123456/filename.mod fakkaata. Hiriyootaaf ergi, mediyaa hawaasaa irratti maxxansi, ykn boodaaf boo'ii godhadhu. Liinkichi yeroo hunda daawwannoo wal fakkaatuu banama.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Kan Steffest uumame. Amiga MOD fi XM trackerwwan durii — ProTracker fi FastTracker II — kan guutumatti JavaScript keessatti barreeffame, deebi'ee hojiirra oole. BassoonTracker, sochii kana jalqabe, taphachuu isa dhugaa fi ho'aa kan qabu yoo ta'u, MOD 4-channel fi XM kan channel baay'ee qabu, kan envelopes, filters, fi effects of dabalatee, guutumatti deeggara.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: API’n fakkiiwwan browser kan suuraa armaan gadii fi yeroo dhugaa ta’e kan hordoftuu paaternii keenyaa agarsiisu. Daataan muuxannoo paaternii 60 fps’n gara WebGL canvas’tti dhangala’ee, bifa muuxannoo scrolling-note kan gulaaltota paaternii durii akka ProTracker fi FastTracker II fakkaatuu amanamummaan uumu.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: Sassawwan meeshaa kompiitarii LLVM irratti hundaa'e kan koodii C/C++ gara WebAssemblytti kompiiluu. Nuti Emscripten fayyadamnee libopenmpt keenya kan fooyyessine — waveform_processor kanneen ofii keenyaa dabalee — gara WASM module faaylii tokkoo kan harkifannaa dhalootaa wajjin wal bira qabameen AudioWorklet keessatti hojjetuutti kompiiluu.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Framworkii CSS kan dura dura fayyadamuu irratti hundaa'e kan miidhaginaaf fayyadu. Sirni tokenii diizayinii Tailwind'ii 16-theme'ii keenyaa kan danda'u — halluu, gaaddidduu, fi daangaan hundinuu akkaataa theme'ii hojiirra jiruu irratti, amaloota CSS'ii kanneen akkaataa qindaa'iina Tailwind'ii keenyaa irraa uumaman fayyadamuun jijjiirama.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Kuusaa wabii muuziqaa hordoftuu qabduu kanneen hordoftuu qabduu, modaayiloota 150,000 ol ta'an kanneen kumaatamaa fakkiiwwanii fi waggaa afur keessaa qabduu. Mod Archive madda muuziqaa kutaalee keenyaa qofaafi dhaabbata bakka bu'uu hin dandeenye kanneen hordoftuu qabduu.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Muuziqii Tracker (kanas "muuziqii module" ykn "muuziqii MOD" jedhamuunis beekkamu) bifa addaa muuziqii dijitaalii kan bara 1980'oota dhuma irratti Kompiitara Amigaa irratti mul'ateedha. MP3 ykn odooyaawwan yaa'aa irraa adda ta'ee, faayiloonni tracker qabiyyee muuziqaa (yaadota, paaternii, fi efektoota) fi saamplii meeshaalee muuziqaa of keessaa qabu — akka faayilii piroojektii muuziqaa of danda'ee. Kun faayiloonni tracker baay'ee xixiqqoo ta'uu isaanii fi walxaxiinsa muuziqaa dinqisiisaa ta'e uumuu isaaniif kan gargaaruudha.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Qaabni kun kan jalqabame Karsten Obarski'n Ultimate Soundtracker isaatiin bara 1987 tti, fi demoscene — aadaa xiqqaa fi jajjaboo kan keessatti sagantessitootni, muuziqoonni, fi fakkistoonni hojiilee dhageettii fi mul'ataa dinqisiisoo uumuuf wal dorgoman — keessatti saffisatti guddachaa deeme. Waggaa hedduu keessatti, qaamolee trackerii kudhanii fi isaa ol kan uumaman, tokkoon tokkoon isaanii daangaa waan danda'amuu danda'u bal'isaa deeman: chaanaalota baay'ee, bu'aa fooyya'aa, meeshaalee muuziqaa kanneen synthiizii, deeggarsa VST plug-inii, fi dandeettii walitti makuu guutuu. Har'a, addunyaa trackerii addunyaa guutuu irratti sochii qaba, muuziqaa haaraa guyyaa guyyaan marsariitii The Mod Archive irratti baafamaa jira.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Kan Qopheessitoota OpenMPT irratti hundaa'e. Mee'oo sagalee banaa kan qopheessitoota itti fayyadaman kan hubannoo qabu, kan foormaatii moojuulii 68+ fi ol kan deeggaru fi sirrummaa walqixa hin qabne. Nuti koodii C kan libopenmpt fooyyessinee — waveform_processor kan adda ta'e tokko daballee kan daataa PCM kan kanalaa hunda keessaa qabuu fi dura oomisha xumuraa dura walitti makuu keessatti qabu — fi Emscripten fayyadamuun gara WebAssemblytti qopheessine. Ijaarsa keenya kan WASM fooyyessame kun, baay'ina duraan qopheessame kan Chiptune3 waliin hidhame bakka buusee, oscilloscopes kanalaa hundaaf karaa banees, fi hundee hiikuuf 68+ foormaatii hundaaf bu'uura ta'a.

AudioWorklet kun iddoo makiinaan Chiptune3 keenya libopenmpt WASM kompaayilame fiigu, fiixee UI guddaa irraa adda ta’ee, taphachuu fiixee fiixee fiixee fiixee fiixee fiixee fiixee fiixee fiixee fiixee tutorialStep1Filters: Filtiraa Bifa'aa — Guurii banuuf cuqaasi, bakka filannoo hedduu qabu. Baatonni durqindaa gareewwan filachuuf fayyadu: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 Hunda (56 bifa), ykn Hundaa Kan Deeggarame.
Filtiraa Chaanaalootaa — Garaagarummaa lakkoofsa chaanaalootaatiin daangessuu: chaanaalota 4 (yeroo MOD durii), chaanaalota 8, ykn chaanaalota 8+ (multitrack ammayyaa).
Filtiraa Guddinaa — Filtiraa guddina faayilii irratti hundaa'uun: xiqqaa (<100KB), giddu-galeessaa, ykn guddaa (>1MB).
Filtira Maqaa Tracker — Maqaa tracker tokko barreessi (fkn., "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") muuziqaa software adda ta'een uumame argachuuf.
Filannoowwaliinsaa — Tarreewwaliinsaa ID, mata-duree, faayila, guddina, ykn guyyaa jijjiiramaa irratti, olka’iinsaan yaa gad-duubaan qindeessi.
Filtoo Filattoo — Giddugalaawwan Hunda, Favoritoota kee, fi Seenaa Taphii kee gidduu jijjiiri.
tutorialStep2Details: Odeeffannoo Daawwannoo — Mata duree, aartistii, foormaatii, lakkoofsa chaanaalotaa, fi lakkoofsa daawwannaa kan sadarkaa to’annoo taphataa irratti agarsiifame.
Cirkulaa/Dhaabuu fi Naanna'uu — Baatana cirkulaa/dhaabuu guddaa fi filannoo haala taphachuu: Walitti Makuu (carraa), Tartiibaan (walduraa duubaan), Maraa Tokko, ykn Erga Ammaa Erga Booda Dhaabuu.
Dhaabbataa Itti Aanuu — Dhaabbataa itti aanuuf ofumaan utaali, ykn haala taphachaa filatte akka itti fudhatuuf dhiisi.
Sagalee fi Fuduraa — Sagalee siliidarii fayyadamuun sirreessi, daawwannaa keessa deemi, yeroo darbe/hambaa argi.
Fakkii Jaalalaa — Rifeensa gara jaalala kee dabaluuf onnee cuqaasi (herrega barbaada).
Buufachuu — Faayila hordoftaa aslii kee meeshaa kee irratti qusadhu.
Liyinaa ModArchive — Fuula karaa baabaa The Mod Archive irratti banii odeeffannoo dabalataa fi yaada hawaasaa argachuuf.

Mee'ee Odeeffannoo Daataa — Ilaalchi meetaadeetaa adda ta'e: maqaa hordoftuu, guyyaa, yeroo, gosa qabataa, faayilaalee xixiqqoo, lakkoofsa chaanaalii, meeshaalee, saamplii, ajaja, paatarnii, fi ergaa kamuu kan qindaa'aa irraa dhufe.
tutorialStep3Details: Ilaa Qaaccessa — Ilaalchi daataa paatarnii trackerii dhugaa yeroo dhugaa keessatti akkaataa ittiin hordofamu, WebGL fayyadamuun hojiif oophii fi salphaa ta’e. Sareen tokkoon tokkoon chaanaalii bakka bu’a, toora tokkoon tokkoon immoo gocha sagalee (note event) bakka bu’a. Ajajawwan sagalee (notes), meeshaalee (instruments), sadarkaa sagalee (volume), fi ajajawwan dhiibbaa (effect commands) hundi agarsiifamu — akka warra gulaalaa trackerii durii (classic tracker editor) sanatti. Paatarnii jijjiiruuf (pattern toggle) cuqaasuun giddugaleessa sararaa (vertical/traditional) fi dalgaa (horizontal/widescreen) gidduu jijjiiri.

Oscilloscopeen kanalii — Garba taphataa jala, sarara dalgaa agarsiisuu tokko tokkoon kan qabdu — kanneen daawwannaa sagalee kanalii tokkoo fi tokkoo keessaa ta’an. Isaan kunneen adeemsa dalgaa kan C-level kan libopenmpt keessatti ijaarameen kan hojjetaman, kan kanalii sagalee tokkoo fi tokkoo odoo walitti makamuu dura baasu. Dalgaa kanalii tokkoo fi tokkoo yeroo dhugaa keessatti akkaataa muuziqaan itti ijaaramu agarsiisuu — dibaa kan kanali 1 irratti, baasii kanali 2 irratti, leedii kanali 3 irratti, fi kkf.
Mee'eeffannoon ykn filannoo irratti, agarsiisuuwwan lamaanuu Settings keessatti dhaamsuu/dhaamsuu baasuu ni danda'ama.
tutorialStep4Settings: Mootoo Baasoo — Filadhu BassoonTracker (MOD/XM durdurii), Chiptune3 (kan gorfamuu, 20+ foormaatii), ykn FFmpeg (foormaatii bal'aa kan tajaajila gara jijjiirraa karaa sarveraa fayyadamu) gidduu filadhu.

Meecha — Filmuu halluuwwan 16 irraa filadhu. Meechawwan ifaa Light, Retro (Solarized), Ocean (Teal), Forest (Green), Strawberry (Pink), Blue, Pink, Cyan, Orange, fi Gray of keessaa qabu. Meechawwan dukkanaa Dark, Midnight (Deep Purple), Golden (Black & Gold), Purple, Red, fi Green of keessaa qabu.
Afaan — 52 afaanota fuulaa. Filannoon kee naannootti olkaa’a.
Sagalee — Sadarkaa sagalee durtii fi filannoodhaan daandii hunda irratti dirqisiisi.
Sagalee Walqixxeessuu — Sagalee taphachii fiixee walqixa dhaggeeffachuuf ofumaan sirreessa (yeroo jalqabaa irratti jira).
Baay'ina Looppii Olaanaa — Sirboota Tracker yeroo baay'ee walitti duubaan yeroo dheeraaf taphata. Baay'ina looppii olaanaa murteessuun taphachuu addaan hin cinne dhorki (durtii: 1).
Togglawwan agarsiisuu — Mul'isuu yookiin dhoksuu agarsiisa daangaa, ilaalcha qaaccessaa, fi kutaa seensa.
tutorialStep5Details: Jaalata — Garaan tokkoon sirba kamuu jaalata keessanitti qusachuuf onnee gochuu, kan filannoo madda tarree taphaa irraa argamu.
Seenaa Tapha — Daawwanniwwan ati taphattu hundinuu ofumaan galmeeffama. Seenaa kee ilaali akkaataa daawwannoo deebitee argachuuf.
Walalii Qaxarama Meejiiwwan — Favoritootni kee fi seenaa kee yeroo seensa gootuu meejiiwwan adda addaa irratti si hordofu.
Piroo — Herraa keessaa fi seenaa qofa kuusa. Ragaalee dhuunfaa tokkollee hin funaanamu ykn hin qoodamu.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.
